campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transit funding investments, discuss a new policy about how the city's property can be used, and address job openings and staffing challenges in city departments.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and efforts to recruit and keep employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to address objections about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the County identified. The council also adopted new policies on technology disruption and established a process for residents to request reasonable accommodations from the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by County
New Technology Disruption Policy for the city
Process for requesting reasonable accommodations from city

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March 2026, and authorize several contracts and agreements. The council approved a road paving contract, accepted a donation of emergency medical equipment, and moved forward with grant applications and a five-year service agreement.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized grant applications for statewide funding
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so they focused on preparing the June 2 agenda by adding new items and scheduling specific discussion times as needed.
keyTopics: May 26, 2026 City Council meeting cancelled
June 2, 2026 agenda items and scheduling
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
City-sponsored events approval process

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed agendas and reports from various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
City Council meeting minutes approval
Board and commission agenda planning

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council opened with a flag salute and approved minutes from the April meeting.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to review updates to the city's long-term health and safety plans through 2040, recognized the Public Works Department for their work maintaining streets, trees, and city infrastructure, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Updates to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (covering 2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions including streets, sidewalks, trees, and facilities
Public Works Week celebration (May 17-23, 2026)
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month recognition

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, to discuss development and planning issues related to transit station areas in the city. The meeting was held in person at City Hall and also available online via Zoom for residents who wanted to participate.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Transit-oriented development planning
Public participation via in-person and Zoom attendance

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a May 2026 meeting to address several land development and zoning matters, including new ordinances and a site development permit amendment. The council also appointed a permanent City Manager during the meeting.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Assessment resolution (possibly related to property or district improvements)
Permanent City Manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles and programs to support this transition while complying with air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to replace gas appliances with electric alternatives
Compliance with Air District regulations requiring reduced gas usage
Proposed principles to guide how the city assists residents with switching to electric systems
Staff presentation on current status and next steps for electrification initiatives
